eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Gunnison; Montrose, CO; at 7:00 AM on JUL 6, 2026 Effective until 3:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: VOLUNTARY EVACUATION: The Montrose County Sheriffs Office has issued a Voluntary Evacuation for properties in Evacuation Zone 34, including the area south of the P77 Road/Cimarron Road intersection and properties on P77 Road one mile north of the intersection. Residents may leave now if they feel unsafe or need additional time to evacuate.  Exact boundaries can be found on the Evacuation Map, available here: https://ouraycountyco.gov/
